dimensionDescriptions.E: Extraversion: you're energized by social interaction, external processing, and action-oriented work.
dimensionDescriptions.I: Introversion: you're energized by solitude, internal processing, and reflection.
dimensionDescriptions.S: Sensing: you focus on concrete facts, practical details, and present reality.
dimensionDescriptions.N: Intuition: you focus on patterns, possibilities, and future potential.
dimensionDescriptions.T: Thinking: you decide based on logic, objective analysis, and consistency.
dimensionDescriptions.F: Feeling: you decide based on values, harmony, and impact on people.
dimensionDescriptions.J: Judging: you prefer structure, planning, closure, and decisiveness.
dimensionDescriptions.P: Perceiving: you prefer flexibility, exploration, openness, and adaptability.

INTJ.title: The Strategist
INTJ.desc: Independence and logical analysis. You thrive in strategic roles where you work independently on complex problems.

INTP.title: The Theorist
INTP.desc: Curiosity and analytical depth. You excel at building models and understanding systems.

ENTJ.title: The Commander
ENTJ.desc: Decisiveness and long-range planning. You fit growth-stage leadership and organizational design.

ENTP.title: The Visionary
ENTP.desc: Ideas and strategic possibility. You fit early-stage exploration and business development.

INFJ.title: The Counselor
INFJ.desc: Quiet conviction and care for people. You fit mission-driven and meaningful work.

INFP.title: The Idealist
INFP.desc: Values and creative imagination. You fit creative and mission-driven ventures.

ENFJ.title: The Mentor
ENFJ.desc: People and shared direction. You fit community building and leadership.

ENFP.title: The Campaigner
ENFP.desc: Enthusiasm and vision. You fit content, community, and mission-led growth.

ISTJ.title: The Inspector
ISTJ.desc: Reliability and order. You fit operations, process, and quality-critical work.

ISFJ.title: The Protector
ISFJ.desc: Care and reliability. You fit support systems and long-term relationships.

ESTJ.title: The Director
ESTJ.desc: Order and execution. You fit operational leadership and management.

ESFJ.title: The Consul
ESFJ.desc: Care and community. You fit community-focused and people-serving work.

ISTP.title: The Crafter
ISTP.desc: Hands-on problem solving. You fit hardware, prototyping, and practical roles.

ISFP.title: The Composer
ISFP.desc: Aesthetics and quiet care. You fit craft and creative production.

ESTP.title: The Entrepreneur
ESTP.desc: Action and opportunism. You fit fast-moving, hands-on ventures.

ESFP.title: The Entertainer
ESFP.desc: Presence and warmth. You fit community and customer-facing roles.

shareTexts.invite: What's your type? Take the 2-minute MBTI-style quiz.

recommendation.label: Outfinity initiative
recommendation.title: Explorer Circle
recommendation.text: Explorer Circle is a community for builders comparing their type and finding teammates whose preferences complement. You do not need to share your result to participate.
recommendation.note: Opening Explorer Circle takes you to Substack. Your result is not transmitted.
